feat.name: Phantom Resemblance
feat.text: Your can now draw from experience to wear any face you remember. When you use Phantom Visage, you gain the effects of a 3rd-rank *illusory disguise* for 1 hour or until you shift back, whichever comes first.

traits.name: Goblin
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a small, frantic goblinoid. Goblins tend to have darkvision. An ability with this trait can be used or chosen only by goblins. A weapon with this trait is created and used by goblins.
